snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world’s worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: 印度疫情活躍個案將飆至48萬  重創階級!印度有錢買不到醫療 | 十點不一樣 20210427
snippet.description:
#印度 #疫情 #變種病毒
根據印度理工學院（IIT）科學家設計的數學模型，印度第二波疫情（編按：科學家指的是活躍個案，即是「正患病的人」）可能在5月14日至18日期間到頂，個案宗數為380,000至480,000；印度武漢肺炎疫情大爆發，新增確診屢創新高。許多城市已無病床收治患者，民眾被迫想辦法在家中治療。但黑市藥品、氧氣瓶和製氧機價格飆漲、假藥充斥，許多人因治療不及死去。詳細內容請鎖定TVBS新聞台。

snippet.title: Star Awards 2021 红星大奖2021  - Awards Ceremony 颁奖典礼
snippet.description:
Set in the internationally acclaimed Changi Airport with star-studded line up of celebrities, Star Awards 2021 returns with a bang after a 2 years long hiatus with the theme “星起点” (Connect!).  Just like the global air hub which provides excellent connectivity to people around the world, the national media network plays an instrumental role in connecting audiences who are distanced apart under the pandemic. It’s time to recognise the heroes who reinvented themselves in bringing the people together again in this annual award ceremony.

《红星2021》时隔两年，以“星起点“为主题，破天荒集合本地航空观光三大巨头：新加坡樟宜机场、星耀樟宜和新加坡航空公司，一起参与红星盛会，象征全体同心、重新整装出发！
红星场地以新加坡樟宜机场和星耀樟宜为典礼场地，并且获得新加坡航空的支持，让艺人在安全距离的保障之下，继续散发星光，以丰富的视觉画面贯穿整个典礼。

-----
Watch more on https://www.mewatch.sg/

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15’ to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

印度新型冠狀病毒肺炎疫情嚴峻，全球多個國家先後就當地醫療系統崩潰和資源極度短缺伸出援手，為其提供包括呼吸機在內的醫療設備。大陸揭曉了中國首輛火星車的名稱─「祝融號」。首輛火星車命名為祝融，寓意點燃中國星際探測的火種，指引人類對浩瀚星空的接續探索和自我超越。詳細內容請鎖定TVBS新聞台。

snippet.title: Singaporean in London attacked, saved by livestreamer
snippet.description:
Singaporean student Raymond Hing, 21, is seen being assaulted in real-time in London. 

The attack was recorded by YouTuber “Sherwin”, who had been doing a livestream. Sherwin’s video shows him rushing to the aid of Mr Hing, shouting repeatedly at the attacker to “Leave him alone!”

The attacker makes a lunge for Mr Hing’s bicycle, before running away.

===========

snippet.title: Singapura Kerahkan MV Swift Rescue dalam Pencarian KRI Nanggala
snippet.description:
Upaya pencarian KRI Nanggala yang hilang terus dilakukan di utara Pulau Bali. Kapal penyelamat MV Swift Rescue milik Singapura langsung dikerahkan ke Selat Bali pada Rabu (21/4/2021) sore. Bagian terpenting dari kapal itu adalah kapal penyelamat submersible Deep Search and Rescue Six (DSAR 6).

#InsidenKRINanggala #KRINanggala402 #Singapura

====================================
Artikel terkait : https://www.kompas.id/baca/nusantara/2021/04/23/tni-maksimalkan-beragam-teknologi-untuk-mencari-kri-nanggala-402-di-perairan-utara-bali/

snippet.description:
JJ Lin 林俊傑 ft. @Anne-Marie 《Bedroom》
🎧  https://jjlin.lnk.to/BedroomftAnneMarieAY

Ohh, why you look so sad?
I’ve never seen you look so bad 
You used to be the strongest of us two
Now look at you, sitting there 

You’re crying in your bedroom
Cos I’ve gone and left you 
Wish I never met you 
Don’t know what you’ve got until it’s gone 
-
A stripped-down piano ballad that shines the spotlight on the distinct, emotive vocals of JJ and the powerhouse vocals of Anne-Marie, this poignant song conveys the different perspectives  and emotional struggles in a relationship.

Imageries of one’s struggles when you’re all alone within the safe space of your own bedroom come to mind when one listens to this track of love and loss. What was the downfall of this relationship? Was it you, or me? How did we arrive at this point? 

Reflections, regrets, indignance, vulnerability and eventually, letting go - Bedroom takes you through the bittersweet emotional journey of lost love.

最極致的在意，就是拼命告訴自己，我不在意
我獨坐在房間裡，用力慶祝這場失去
你獨坐在房間裡，輕撫著後悔的淚水
_
是不該再留戀的覺悟，還是掩飾著痛徹心扉

昏暗的房間中透出孤零零的身影，不多加修飾，Anne-Marie 獨特的嗓音優雅地搭乘著鋼琴登場，宛如平靜湖面上興起的漣漪般令人深陷其魅力中，間奏JJ的和聲讓兩人的聲線纏繞著，勾出絲絲綿延的情感，而後段JJ清澈高亢的嗓音，從乾淨的鋼琴伴奏中穿透而出，為昏暗的房間點上輕柔閃耀的燭光，為歌曲增加一股堅定的並透出隱隱的傷感。

JJ Lin繼Steve Aoki後，再度跨越國界，與英國的超強實力女歌手Anne-Marie合作，JJ清亮且充滿渲染力聲線搭配Anne-Marie渾厚且充滿魅力的嗓音，豐富這首”Bedroom”的層次，兩人詮釋相同的歌曲段落、相同的歌詞，卻演繹出截然不同的情緒。宛如不同時空面對同一段離別，有女人的聲嘶力竭，也有男人的孤傲逞強，一體兩面的情感展現，都是歷經傷痛的情節。整首歌曲的詮釋，不僅是兩位歌手的實力飆歌，更體現了另一種時空對話的男女合唱。

#JJLin #AnneMarie #Bedroom
#JJLinLikeYouDo #JJXIV
＿

■ Bedroom

Ooh, why you look so sad?
I’ve never seen you look so bad
You used to be the strongest of us two
Now look at you, sitting there

Ooh, no-ones picking up the phone
The partys over and you’re all alone
I used to give a fuck ‘bout me and you
Now I look at you and I don’t care

You’re crying in your bedroom
Cos I’ve gone and left you
Wish I never met you
Don’t know what you’ve got until it’s gone

You’re crying in your bedroom
Easy to forget you
Done this to yourself
And now I’m gone

Now I’m celebrating
My god I bet you hate it
I can’t believe I waited for you for so long

You’re crying in your bedroom
Cos I’ve gone and left you
Don’t know what you’ve got until it’s

Go-o-o-o-one…

Ooh, why you look so sad? girl
I’ve never seen you look so bad
You used to be the strongest of us two
Now look at you, sitting there

Ooh, no one’s picking up the phone
The party’s over and you’re all alone
I used to give a fuck ‘bout me and you
Now I look at you and I don’t care

You’re crying in your bedroom
Cos I’ve gone and left you
Wish I never met you
Don’t know what you’ve got until it’s gone

You’re crying in your bedroom
Easy to forget you
Done this to yourself
And now I’m gone

Now I’m celebrating
My god I bet you hate it
I can’t believe I waited for you for so long

You’re crying in your bedroom
Cos I’ve gone and left you
Don’t know what you’ve got until it’s

Go-o-o-o-one…

為何你看起來如此悲傷？
我未見過你這樣糟
你一直是我們之中最堅強的那位
現在看著你 坐在那裡

沒有人接聽電話
派對結束 你獨自一人
從前我非常在乎我和你
現在望著你 我絲毫不在意

你在臥室裡哭泣
因為我已經離開了你
但願我從未遇見你
不知道自己擁有什麼 直到失去

你在臥室裡哭泣
忘記你很容易
你是自找的
而我已經離去

如今我在慶祝
我敢打賭你一定很怨恨
不敢相信自己等了你這麼久

你在臥室裡哭泣
因為我已經離開了你
不知道自己擁有什麼

直到失去

為何你看起來如此悲傷？女孩
我未見過你這樣糟
你一直是我們之中最堅強的那位
現在看著你 坐在那裡

沒有人接聽電話
派對結束 你獨自一人
從前我非常在乎我和你
現在望著你 我絲毫不在意

你在臥室裡哭泣
因為我已經離開了你
但願我從未遇見你
不知道自己擁有什麼 直到失去

忘記你很容易
你是自找的
而我已經離去

如今我在慶祝
我敢打賭你一定很怨恨
不敢相信自己等了你這麼久

你在臥室裡哭泣
因為我已經離開了你
不知道自己擁有什麼

直到失去

snippet.title: BREAKING NEWS - Ditemukan di Kedalaman 838 Meter, Badan KRI Nanggala 402 Terbelah Jadi 3 Bagian
snippet.description:
KOMPAS.TV - Kepala Staf Angkatan Laut (KSAL) Laksamana TNI Yudo Margono menyatakan kondisi kapal KRI Nanggala-402 terbelah menjadi tiga bagian.

Terdapat bagian yang terlepas dari badan utama kapal.

"Berikut ini terdapat bagian-bagian dari KRI Nanggala. Di sana KRI Nanggala terbelah jadi 3 bagian," ujar Yudo dalam konferensi pers, Minggu (25/4).

Yudo menjelaskan terdapat bagian belakang kapal tak berbadan tekan, selanjutnya kemudi horizontal dan vertikal.

Pantauan ini terlihat melalui alat ROV dari Singapura yang mendapat kontak visual dan memperlihatkan adanya serpihan badan kapal KRI Nanggala 402 di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara itu, Panglima TNI, Marsekal Hadi Cahyanto menyatakan seluruh awak yang berada dalam KRI Nanggala 402 telah gugur.

Hal ini disampaikan langsung pada saat konferensi pers TNI pada Minggu, 25 April 2021.

Pernyataan ini berdasarkan temuan serpihan dan adanya sinyal Kapal selam KRI Nanggala 402 yang terdeteksi terakhir berada di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara diberitakan Schmidt Ocean Institute yang dikutip Kompas.com, di kedalaman lebih dari 800 meter kondisi air tidak seperti yang dirasakan di kolam renang.

Tekanan hidrostatis air meningkat sebanyak 1 atm setiap kedalaman 10 meter.

Artinya, jika tekanan di udara adalah 1 atm, tekanan di kedalaman 850 meter adalah 85 atm.

Sementara manusia hanya bisa bertahan pada tekanan sekitar 3 hingga 4 atm.

Mulai dari kedalaman 200 meter, semua cahaya mulai hilang dan suhu turun drastis.

Pada kondisi ini, laut benar-benar hitam. Cahaya mungkin hanya berasal dari bakteri dan hewan yang menghasilkan cahaya.

Hal itu juga yang menjadi salah satu alasan kenapa awak kapal selam KRI Nanggala-402 tidak dapat begitu saja keluar dari kapal selam.

Berenang di laut pada kedalaman 850 adalah hal yang tidak mungkin bagi manusia, rasanya mungkin akan sama seperti dinjak 100 ekor gajah di kepala.

snippet.title: Indonesian navy finds debris from missing submarine | DW News
snippet.description:
Military officials in Indonesia's say they have found items from the submarine that went missing last Wednesday, crushing hopes of any survivors among the 53-member crew. The KRI Nanggala 402 submarine had been classified as missing, but Indonesia's navy says, now it is officially declaring it a sunken vessel.  The sub's oxygen supply is believed to have run out early Saturday. Several countries sent warships and aircraft to help with the search. Rescue crews believe they have located the submarine deep underwater.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I’m not with you
But then you saw me caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eyes
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could’ve asked my why I broke your heart
You could’ve told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn’t there
And just pretended like you didn’t care
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another…
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

ARIANA GRANDE
Met you once under a Pisces moon
I kept my distance ‘cause I know that you
Don’t like when I’m with nobody else
I couldn’t help it, I put you through hell
I don’t know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back ‘cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that it’s much too late
And you deserve someone better

THE WEEKND & ARIANA GRANDE

snippet.title: India Covid crisis: families desperate for space to cremate their dead
snippet.description:
Medical supplies are beginning to trickle into India to help tackle the overwhelming surge in numbers of people suffering and dying from the virus. (Subscribe: https://bit.ly/C4_News_Subscribe)

But medical staff there are saying it's a mere drop in the ocean.  
Ongoing gatherings for religious festivals and local elections are raising fears the virus will be spread yet further as the official number of dead approaches 200,000 - a figure regarded as a considerable under-estimate.

And a warning, this report from our Foreign Affairs Correspondent Jonathan Rugman contains distressing images. 

-------

snippet.title: On Camera, Doctors Attacked After Covid Patient Dies At Delhi Hospital
snippet.description:
Doctors at a Delhi hospital were attacked Tuesday morning by the attendants of a woman, 67, who died in the emergency ward after her admission to the ICU was delayed due to a lack of beds. An unspecified number of doctors were injured in the clash outside Apollo Hospital in the national capital, which took place between 8 and 10 am. The police arrived an hour later - around 11 am. (Disclaimer: Content in this video could be disturbing for viewers.)

snippet.title: Star Awards 2021 红星大奖2021 - Backstage Live 幕后直击

With Hazelle Teo, Jeremy Chan, Dennis Chew and Juin Teh carrying the hosting torch, just like sports commentary, audience can catch this first ever 7-hour live commentary online. With cameras intruding behind the scenes, roving reporters capturing unexpected moments, first hand news and  reactions from the celebrities.

仿佛球赛评论、大选评论般，通过及时、真实、大胆、有趣的方式，7小时马拉松不间断直击年度盛典《红星大奖2021》台前幕后精彩看点，让观众即时捕捉幕后发生的大小事、艺人第一反应等。

snippet.title: 李榮浩 Ronghao Li《不遺憾》Official Music Video（電影【你的婚禮】主題曲）
snippet.description:
電影《你的婚禮》主題曲《不遺憾》，由王曉東（時光列車）作曲，李榮浩擔任製作人，並作詞和演唱。歌詞描述充滿電影感，以自白的口吻講述男生目睹心愛的女孩成為新娘的心路歷程，滿溢的情緒在磅礴弦樂中得到釋放，細膩敏感的歌詞淋漓盡致地顯露出深刻的愛與不捨。

面對愛與被愛的這些人生難題，或許我們都該學會釋然與寬容。 ‘’錯過了也不遺憾，只要是好答案”，歌詞中藏匿的心思，希望有一天你會懂。在我們相愛過後，擁有的溫暖不曾忘記，即使無法繼續，也會一生銘記。

愛過就好，我不遺憾。

#李榮浩
#不遺憾
#你的婚禮
＿

■ 不遺憾
詞：李榮浩 曲：王曉東@時光列車TIMEEXPRESS

終於看到
你穿著想要的 那種婚紗
你右手接過 那捧花
從今後 換成他 保護你 照顧你
不論貧窮富裕
不論生老病疾

以後路上
知道你會過的 有模有樣
我不會中途 先退場
我要等那一幕
我知道我會哭
也知道我哭是為給你祝福

愛過了 就不遺憾
有什麼 好遺憾
今後提起 你的姓名 談笑我也可以
想到曾經在一起
爭吵歡笑都發自內心
愛情不止一種定義

錯過了 也不遺憾
只要是 好答案
別回頭看 回頭太難 你要變得勇敢
這一輩子我欠你 如果來生還可能繼續
再用盡一生找尋 你在哪裡
_

製作人：李榮浩
監製：郭棟楠@青春光線

snippet.title: Eks KKM Laksda (Purn) Frans Wuwung Ungkap Penyebab KRI Nanggala-402 Tenggelam hingga Terbelah
snippet.description:
KOMPAS.TV - Kepala Staf Angkatan Laut (KSAL) Laksamana TNI Yudo Margono menyatakan kondisi kapal KRI Nanggala-402 terbelah menjadi tiga bagian.

Terdapat bagian yang terlepas dari badan utama kapal.

Yudo menjelaskan terdapat bagian belakang kapal tak berbadan tekan, selanjutnya kemudi horizontal dan vertikal.

Pantauan ini terlihat melalui alat ROV dari Singapura yang mendapat kontak visual dan memperlihatkan adanya serpihan badan kapal KRI Nanggala 402 di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara itu, kabar duka disampaikan oleh Panglima TNI, Marsekal Hadi Cahyanto yang menyatakan seluruh awak yang berada dalam KRI Nanggala 402 telah gugur.

Hal ini disampaikan langsung pada saat konferensi pers TNI pada Minggu, 25 April 2021.

Pernyataan ini berdasarkan temuan serpihan dan adanya sinyal Kapal selam KRI Nanggala 402 yang terdeteksi terakhir berada di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara diberitakan Schmidt Ocean Institute yang dikutip Kompas.com, di kedalaman lebih dari 800 meter kondisi air tidak seperti yang dirasakan di kolam renang.

Mantan Kepala Kamar Mesin KRI Nanggala-402, Laksamana Muda (Purnawirawan) Frans Wuwung menyebutkan kapal tenggelam dan terbelah akibat sudah melewati batas maksimum kedalaman.

Tekanan hidrostatis air meningkat sebanyak 1 atm setiap kedalaman 10 meter. Artinya, jika tekanan di udara adalah 1 atm, tekanan di kedalaman 850 meter adalah 85 atm dan manusia hanya bisa bertahan pada tekanan sekitar 3-4 atm.

Berenang di laut pada kedalaman 850 adalah hal yang tidak mungkin bagi manusia, rasanya mungkin akan sama seperti dinjak 100 ekor gajah di kepala.

Doa dan rasa hormat menyertai kepergian 53 awak KRI Nanggala-402, setelah kapal selam tersebut dinyatakan tenggelam.

Simak dialog selengkapnya bersama Mantan Kepala Kamar Mesin KRI Nanggala-402, Laksamana Muda (Purnawirawan) Frans Wuwung, Pengamat Militer dari Institut for Security and Strategic Studies (ISESS) Khairul Fahmi dan Jurnalis Harian Kompas, Edna Pattisina.

snippet.title: India: No hospital beds - families take their dying to temples
snippet.description:
People are dying waiting for oxygen, waiting for ambulances, waiting for hospital beds.

(Subscribe: https://bit.ly/C4_News_Subscribe)

From the official figures alone, this has been India's deadliest day yet of the pandemic and the real problem could be many times worse.

And if vaccination is the best way to protect the population, there simply aren't nearly enough doses to go around.

We hear from our reporter Mandikini Gahlot, who's in New Delhi, and be warned: there are some distressing scenes in the report.

-------

Watch more of our explainer series here - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXjqQf1xYLQ6bu-iixvoFTVsiXQVlVniX

localized.description:
People are dying waiting for oxygen, waiting for ambulances, waiting for hospital beds.

(Subscribe: https://bit.ly/C4_News_Subscribe)

From the official figures alone, this has been India's deadliest day yet of the pandemic and the real problem could be many times worse.

And if vaccination is the best way to protect the population, there simply aren't nearly enough doses to go around.

We hear from our reporter Mandikini Gahlot, who's in New Delhi, and be warned: there are some distressing scenes in the report.

-------

Watch more of our explainer series here - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXjqQf1xYLQ6bu-iixvoFTVsiXQVlVniX
Get more news at our site - https://www.channel4.com/news/

snippet.title: TWICE 「Kura Kura」 Music Video
snippet.description:
TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLE『Kura Kura』    
2021.05.12 Release!

【いい音楽で一度、素晴らしいパフォーマンスで二度魅了させる】と言う意味を持つ、Asia No.1最強ガールズグループTWICE。

TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLE『Kura Kura』（読み：クラクラ）を5月12日（水）にリリース！

静かで平和な休日の午前に集まった9人の女の子たちが、美味しそうなブランチを目の前にして、それぞれの恋についてのガールズトークをはじめる。
自分のペースで成長する彼女たちは「君」という特別な存在に恋をし、揺れ動く恋心を、別れに悲しむ愛、終わりのない幸せに溢れる愛など、人の数だけ様々な形で存在するということをメンバー全員が異なるシチュエーションで表現。
9人の感情は花が咲くように盛り上がり、咲いては壊れたりなど、愛の明暗を表現した作品となる。

「Kura Kura」はTWICEのプロデューサーJ.Y. Parkが作詞を担当。

2021年は新体感ライブ CONNECTを皮切りに、コロナ禍で活動ができなかった時間を学びの時間と変えた彼女たちの新しい表現を存分に魅せ、励まし、そして寄り添うことを表現した2020年から、ファン・家族・友達などすべての人やモノに対する「愛」を発信する2021年となる。

---------------------------------
TWICE OFFICIAL FANCLUB ONCE JAPAN
http://oncejapan.com

TWICE JAPAN OFFICIAL SITE
http://www.twicejapan.com

TWICE JAPAN OFFICIAL TWITTER
https://twitter.com/jypetwice_japan

TWICE JAPAN OFFICIAL INSTAGRAM
https://www.instagram.com/jypetwice_japan/

TWICE JAPAN OFFICIAL YouTube Channel
https://www.youtube.com/c/twicejapanofficial

TWICE JAPAN OFFICIAL TikTok
https://vt.tiktok.com/DkuM3k/

---------------------------------

snippet.title: Sambil Menangis, Panglima TNI Nyatakan KRI Nanggala-402 Tenggelam
snippet.description:

snippet.title: 印度疫情「連死也無法死得安詳」　火葬場工人：人被當成牲畜看待 | 台灣新聞 Taiwan 蘋果新聞網
snippet.description:
印度近日疫情大幅惡化，醫療物資嚴重短缺，醫院無法照顧有需要的病人，不少患者家屬帶著病人走過一間又一間醫院叩門，均未能及時獲供氧治療，最終很多人等不及住院橫死街頭。由於病歿人數太多，多地連殯葬設施也不勝負荷，有護士形容患者「連死也無法死得安詳」，火葬場工人更慨嘆，現在死去的話根本無法舉辦應有儀式，屍體運來就要火化，人命賤如牲畜。

灰暗天空下，傅達仁在家人的攙扶下，緩步走出飯店，他伸出瘦如柴枝的左手指了指天空，語氣堅決地留下一句「這仗一定要打」，毫不回頭地踏上生命的最後一段路。生命的終場哨音響起，知名前體育主播傅達仁，昨天如願結束自己的生命，享壽85歲。 「擦板～得分」、「壞壞壞連三壞」，和生命的延長賽終究還是結束，傅達仁鮮活俏皮的轉播片段和播球風格，終成絕響，卻將永遠留在球迷和觀眾心中。

傅達仁5月底前往瑞士後，《蘋果》在他結束自己生命前，對他進行獨家專訪，昨天也全程直擊他在家人陪同下，搭車前往瑞士「尊嚴」機構（DIGNITAS）走向生命終點的過程。 蘇黎世這幾天原本陽光普照，但傅達仁選擇離開人世的這天，天氣卻是灰濛濛的。他前天接受《蘋果》專訪時還能講話，昨卻連下車都沒有力氣，雙腳瘦到見骨，整個人虛弱至極。

台灣時間昨天下午3時45分左右，座車抵達他下榻的飯店後，傅達仁和家人約半小時後才上車，傅達仁身著黑色西裝，上頭別了紀念父親的抗戰七十年勝利徽章，腳穿黑色球鞋，在太太鄭貽的攙扶下走出飯店大廳，兒子、媳婦走在前面，他的紅粉知己陳小姐則抱著兩束花跟在後頭，他和妻子跟著緩步走出，記者忍著哀傷向他道別「大哥再見」，他從容回應「拜拜」。

上車前，傅達仁輕揮左手並伸出食指比天，意謂著「感謝上帝」，留下遺言：「這仗一定要打！」這也是傅達仁在公開場合所講的最後一句話。他的乾兒子李恕權則沉重地走在最後。

《蘋果》直擊，下午4時45分，座車抵達尊嚴機構，傅達仁的兒媳先下車，接著李恕權、傅的老婆鄭貽、紅粉知己陳小姐陸續下車，兒子見傅達仁下車有些困難，又回頭扶傅下車。傅達仁在5名親友陪伴下，緩步走入「尊嚴」，他揮手向《蘋果》記者道別，這也是他最後的身影。

傅達仁和家屬進入「尊嚴」約一小時，部分家屬因心情沉重，一度到院子池塘旁休息。「尊嚴」地處偏遠的工業區，對面只有農田和足球場，鮮少有人車經過，《蘋果》記者在現場守候約2小時，幾乎沒有人車經過，只聽得到清脆悅耳的鳥叫聲，天空則有老鷹低飛盤旋。

安樂死是由醫師幫病人施打藥物，但瑞士法律並不允許安樂死，傅達仁在「尊嚴」接受的則是輔助、陪伴性自殺，他必須自己先服下止吐劑，半小時後再喝快速起效的短效全身麻醉劑「硫噴妥鈉」，接著會慢慢陷入昏迷，最後因為呼吸系統癱瘓，在10分鐘到1小時內死亡。

據了解，傅就死前極為虛弱，但結束生命的意志極為堅定，他曾透露非常害怕自己跌倒受傷，因為不清醒就無法執行，加上對信仰的堅定，讓他決意完成神給的使命，成為台灣第一位站出來公開倡議、並刻宣布在「尊嚴」執行輔助自殺的台灣會員。

全程歷時逾2小時

昨晚7時37分左右，傅達仁妻子證實傅的死訊，「傅達仁已沒呼吸心跳，離開這個世界」。他在昨晚6時58分離世，全程歷時2小時13分。所有過程執行結束後，傅達仁將在瑞士火化，由於火化也要排隊，所以時間未定，但家屬希望能帶他的骨灰回台灣。

傅達仁因病痛纏身，希望結束自己生命，但因台灣不允許安樂死，去年11月遠赴瑞士「尊嚴」機構，取得「綠燈」資格，由醫護人員執行陪伴性自殺，但因兒子即將結婚而暫停，直到5月底才再度前往瑞士。

傅達仁是知名體育主播，他播報籃球、棒球時的特別用語「蓋火鍋」、「急停拉竿」、「三不管地帶」，甚至成為體育界的通用語，他罹患重病生命走到盡頭之際，依然挺身而出鼓吹安樂死合法化，他的一生，正如他鼓勵所有觀眾「年輕時，奮鬥向前；年老時，喜樂再見」。

When the world was first warned about coronavirus it was a crisis like that unfolding in India that scientists were worried about, and it's only intensifying.

There is also a new record number of cases - more than 360,000. That's the seventh day above 300,000.

snippet.title: Covid: India faces 'disaster' as cases surge and hospitals suffer oxygen shortage | ITV News
snippet.description:
Health officials in India are urging people not to panic as the government insisted it's doing all it can to get oxygen to desperate Covid patients.

Supplies are being diverted from industrial use, as hospitals run out.

Once again the country recorded the highest ever number of new infections for a fifth day in a row.

One doctor warned India will become a "disaster zone" if cases continue to rise.

And a warning - this report from our Correspondent John Ray contains some upsetting images.

snippet.title: Indonesia authorities say found missing submarine, all 53 crew confirmed dead
snippet.description:
Indonesian military chief on Sunday (April 25) confirmed all crew onboard the sunken submarine KRI Nanggala-402 have died.

Navy chief of staff  Yudo Margono said the submarine was found broken into three parts deep in the Bali sea . 

The submarine had lost contact on Wednesday (April 21) as it prepared to conduct a torpedo drill.

snippet.title: 【INTO1 FIRST STAGE PERFORMANCE】NEW Group Song 'INTO1'! We are INTO1! 成团曲首秀！ | 创造营 CHUANG2021
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

《创造营2021》是由腾讯视频出品的国际青年文化交流男团成长综艺，致力于充分展现新时代国际青年人的音乐舞台表现力、青春活力和拼搏向上力。节目召集来自不同国家、不同经纪公司和院校的近百名学员，在多位榜样前辈的引领、助力、陪伴下一同进行文化与专业交流、打破重组迎接挑战，一同探索真我热血追梦。

snippet.title: Prince Philip’s Funeral: Harry and William come together | 9 News Australia
snippet.description:
Prince William and Prince Harry have seemingly come together in a show of unity moments after leaving their grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral, at Windsor Castle. Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2noaGhv Get more breaking news at: https://bit.ly/2nobVgF

Royal commentator Ashley Pearson says she believes it was Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, who first appeared to engage in conversation with Harry. 

3:30 Lady Penny Mountbatten has also reflected on the late Prince Philip and his fitting funeral service.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

0:00 素顏Winnie Tan

snippet.title: 53 sailors presumed dead after sunken Indonesia submarine debris found
snippet.description:
Indonesian authorities have confirmed a submarine that went missing with 53 people on board has sunk.
Crews found debris from the KRI Nanggala 402 near the coast of Bali, and authorities say it is evidence that the vessel cracked.
They believe the submarine could be 850 metres below the ocean surface, making the search effort more difficult and dangerous.
Al Jazeera's Jessica Washington reports from Jakarta, Indonesia.

snippet.title: Sethupathi - Full HD Movie | Vijay Sethupathi |  Ramya Nambesan |  Vela Ramamoorthy | Vivek Prasanna
snippet.description:
#tamilmovies#sethupathi#vijaysethupathi

Sub-Inspector Subburaj, who is on night rounds in his C3 Station limits, is lured into a trap and burnt to death by a group of henchmen. Despite being burnt inside his station, he stumbles across a small bridge and dies inside C4 Station's limit. This causes tension to the planner of the attack.

Sethupathi (Vijay Sethupathi) is the police inspector of C4 Station in Madurai who is awaiting his confirmed promotion to ACP. Subburaj's case is given to him. Sethupathi finds out that an influential don and politician, Vaathiyar (Vela Ramamoorthy) of Melur, is behind the murder. Kanagavel is married to Vaathiyar's daughter, but the marriage is unhappy. Therefore, Vaathiyar had decided to kill Kanagavel. Kanagavel was off-duty due to minor injury on the day he was supposed to be murdered, and Subburaj, who was attached as Crime SI in the same police station, was filling in for him. Sethupathi arrests Vaathiyar during a temple festival and forces him to travel to Chennai to apply for bail, earning his enmity.

Later, Sethupathi interrogates two adolescent schoolboys who had sold a stolen chain that was lost in a chain-snatching attempt. When they do not speak up, Sethupathi threatens to shoot them on the count of five, albeit using a non-locked gun. At the fifth count, he accidentally shoots one of the boys in the neck when the other tries to flee, leaving him critically injured. Sethupathi is charged with attempt-to-murder and is suspended. However, he had no intention of shooting either of the boys and realized someone had unlocked his gun, which he had thought was locked. He soon finds out that Kanagavel is responsible for unlocking his gun. Kanagavel covertly bribed constable Muruganandham in C4 Station to unlock the gun and replace the bullets with dummy ones, so that Sethupathi will be defenseless when attacked by Vaathiyar's men. Kanagavel assumed that if an inspector (who is investigating the brutal murder of a sub-inspector) is attacked, the department would retaliate harshly to either kill or to put Vaathiyar in jail for life, so Kanagavel will be not be separated from his daughter.

Sethupathi and Muruganandham appear before an inquiry of three officials to prove the former's innocence. However, one of the members of the inquiry panel is an ally of Vaathiyar and she tries to influence the panel against Sethupathi. Muruganandham's daughter is kidnapped minutes before the inquiry, and he turns against Sethupathi. The same evening, the City Police Commissioner and Regional Civil Commissioner visit Muruganandham's home and discover all the truths. Since these two officers are on the committee, Sethupathi's job is saved. However, Sethupathi's troubles are still not over; Vaathiyar burns Kanagavel alive and start targeting Sethupathi and his family. Sethupathi overcomes all the hurdles put by Vaathiyar and his henchmen. Vaathiyar then decides to silence Sethupathi once and for all by sending his henchmen to kill Sethupathi's wife Malarvizhi (Remya Nambeesan) and two children, but Sethupathi's son, who is aware of the police work, wields Sethupathi's armed revolver to ward them off. Infuriated with the failed attempt, Vaathiyar instructs his men to kill the schoolboy injured by Sethupathi and puts the blame on him. However, Sethupathi, aware of Vaathiyar's plan, guards the hospital where the boy is admitted and saves him from Vaathiyar's henchmen.

With Sethupathi returning to work, Vaathiyar's henchmen accept defeat and warn Vaathiyar to leave Madurai for good, but he does not take heed. The next day, Sethupathi kills Vaathiyar by setting his house on fire and closes his case.

Directed by S. U. Arun Kumar
Produced by Shan Sutharsan
Written by S. U. Arun Kumar
Starring Vijay Sethupathi
Remya Nambeesan
Music by Nivas K. Prasanna
Cinematography Dinesh Krishnan
Edited by A. Sreekar Prasad
Production
company 
Vansan Movies

Sethupathi and Muruganandham appear before an inquiry of three officials to prove the former's innocence. However, one of the members of the inquiry panel is an ally of Vaathiyar and she tries to influence the panel against Sethupathi. Muruganandham's daughter is kidnapped minutes before the inquiry, and he turns against Sethupathi. The same evening, the City Police Commissioner and Regional Civil Commissioner visit Muruganandham's home and discover all the truths. Since these two officers are on the committee, Sethupathi's job is saved. However, Sethupathi's troubles are still not over; Vaathiyar burns Kanagavel alive and start targeting Sethupathi and his family. Sethupathi overcomes all the hurdles put by Vaathiyar and his henchmen. Vaathiyar then decides to silence Sethupathi once and for all by sending his henchmen to kill Sethupathi's wife Malarvizhi (Remya Nambeesan) and two children, but Sethupathi's son, who is aware of the police work, wields Sethupathi's armed revolver to ward them off. Infuriated with the failed attempt, Vaathiyar instructs his men to kill the schoolboy injured by Sethupathi and puts the blame on him. However, Sethupathi, aware of Vaathiyar's plan, guards the hospital where the boy is admitted and saves him from Vaathiyar's henchmen.

With Sethupathi returning to work, Vaathiyar's henchmen accept defeat and warn Vaathiyar to leave Madurai for good, but he does not take heed. The next day, Sethupathi kills Vaathiyar by setting his house on fire and closes his case.

Directed by S. U. Arun Kumar
Produced by Shan Sutharsan
Written by S. U. Arun Kumar
Starring Vijay Sethupathi
Remya Nambeesan
Music by Nivas K. Prasanna
Cinematography Dinesh Krishnan
Edited by A. Sreekar Prasad
Production
company 
Vansan Movies

ta.title: Sethupathi - Full HD Movie | Vijay Sethupathi |  Ramya Nambesan |  Vela Ramamoorthy | Vivek Prasanna
ta.description:
#tamilmovies#sethupathi#vijaysethupathi

Sub-Inspector Subburaj, who is on night rounds in his C3 Station limits, is lured into a trap and burnt to death by a group of henchmen. Despite being burnt inside his station, he stumbles across a small bridge and dies inside C4 Station's limit. This causes tension to the planner of the attack.

Sethupathi (Vijay Sethupathi) is the police inspector of C4 Station in Madurai who is awaiting his confirmed promotion to ACP. Subburaj's case is given to him. Sethupathi finds out that an influential don and politician, Vaathiyar (Vela Ramamoorthy) of Melur, is behind the murder. Kanagavel is married to Vaathiyar's daughter, but the marriage is unhappy. Therefore, Vaathiyar had decided to kill Kanagavel. Kanagavel was off-duty due to minor injury on the day he was supposed to be murdered, and Subburaj, who was attached as Crime SI in the same police station, was filling in for him. Sethupathi arrests Vaathiyar during a temple festival and forces him to travel to Chennai to apply for bail, earning his enmity.

Later, Sethupathi interrogates two adolescent schoolboys who had sold a stolen chain that was lost in a chain-snatching attempt. When they do not speak up, Sethupathi threatens to shoot them on the count of five, albeit using a non-locked gun. At the fifth count, he accidentally shoots one of the boys in the neck when the other tries to flee, leaving him critically injured. Sethupathi is charged with attempt-to-murder and is suspended. However, he had no intention of shooting either of the boys and realized someone had unlocked his gun, which he had thought was locked. He soon finds out that Kanagavel is responsible for unlocking his gun. Kanagavel covertly bribed constable Muruganandham in C4 Station to unlock the gun and replace the bullets with dummy ones, so that Sethupathi will be defenseless when attacked by Vaathiyar's men. Kanagavel assumed that if an inspector (who is investigating the brutal murder of a sub-inspector) is attacked, the department would retaliate harshly to either kill or to put Vaathiyar in jail for life, so Kanagavel will be not be separated from his daughter.

Muruganandham's daughter is kidnapped minutes before the inquiry, and he turns against Sethupathi. The same evening, the City Police Commissioner and Regional Civil Commissioner visit Muruganandham's home and discover all the truths. Since these two officers are on the committee, Sethupathi's job is saved. However, Sethupathi's troubles are still not over; Vaathiyar burns Kanagavel alive and start targeting Sethupathi and his family. Sethupathi overcomes all the hurdles put by Vaathiyar and his henchmen. Vaathiyar then decides to silence Sethupathi once and for all by sending his henchmen to kill Sethupathi's wife Malarvizhi (Remya Nambeesan) and two children, but Sethupathi's son, who is aware of the police work, wields Sethupathi's armed revolver to ward them off. Infuriated with the failed attempt, Vaathiyar instructs his men to kill the schoolboy injured by Sethupathi and puts the blame on him. However, Sethupathi, aware of Vaathiyar's plan, guards the hospital where the boy is admitted and saves him from Vaathiyar's henchmen.

With Sethupathi returning to work, Vaathiyar's henchmen accept defeat and warn Vaathiyar to leave Madurai for good, but he does not take heed. The next day, Sethupathi kills Vaathiyar by setting his house on fire and closes his case.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: BULAGA! SEAMAN, NA-AKTUHAN SI MRS AT DRIVER SA CONDO.
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 17 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: KSAL Ungkap Kru Kapal KRI Nanggala Sempat Berusaha Selamatkan Diri di Keadaan Darurat, Ini Faktanya
snippet.description:
TRIBUN-VIDEO.COM - Kru KRI Nanggala 402 diketahui sempat berusaha selamatkan diri saat keadaan darurat sebelum kapal selam tersebut tenggelam di laut utara Bali.

Berdasarkan temuan dari TNI, kru kapal diduga berusaha mengeluarkan baju keselamatan yang ada di dalam kotak khusus.

Namun baju keselamatan tersebut diduga tidak sempat dipakai.

Kepala Staf TNI Angkatan Laut (KSAL) Laksamana Yudo Margono,menjelaskan, escape suit MK 11 (baju keselamatan awak kapal selam) menjadi barang yang ditemukan oleh ROV MV Swift Rescue dari Singapura.

Escape suit MK 11 tersebut biasanya disimpan di dalam kotak dan dikeluarkan dalam keadaan darurat.

Dengan temuan ini, KSAL menduga bahwa kru kapal mengalami kedaruratan hingga berusaha untuk mengambil baju itu dari dalam kotak.

"Escape suit MK 11 yang biasanya ini disimpan di kotak, tetapi ini bisa lepas berarti ada kedaruratan sehingga diambil dari kotak akan dipakai," kata Yudo dalam konferensi pers secara virtual, Minggu (25/4/2021).

Yudo menduga, escape suit MK 11 tersebut memang sempat dikeluarkan, tetapi belum sempat dipakai karena adanya kondisi darurat.

"Harusnya ini tersimpan di kotak, dipakai ketika terjadi kedaruratan. Nah, karena ini lepas, berarti sempat di situ terjadi kedaruratan, mungkin enggak sempat pakai atau saat dipakai (kapal) goyang sehingga lepas," ujarnya.

Diketahui, MV Swift Rescue menemukan kontak visual dengan KRI Nanggala 402.

Badan kapal tersebut diketahui terbelah menjadi 3 bagian dan ditemukan di kedalaman 838 meter.

Ia menuturkan ada bagian kapal yang masih utuh, tetapi ada bagian yang retak kecil.

"Bagian terbuka ini (menayangkan gambar) berserakan tidak terlalu jelas karena bawah laut tidak terang tadi pagi ini, bagian-bagian dari dalamnya kapal. Dan ini bagian terbuka dan lepas," ucapnya.

Dengan kondisi kapal selam yang berada di kedalaman 838 meter, sangat kecil kemungkinan kru kapal tersebut bisa diselamatkan,

"Tadi sudah disampaikan Panglima TNI rasa duka tentunya mereka menjadi korban dalam kejadian ini," pungkasnya.

(Tribun-Video.com)


Artikel ini telah tayang di Tribunnews.com dengan judul Baju Keselamatan Ditemukan, Awak KRI Nanggala Diduga Tak Sempat Pakai, KASAL Ungkap Kemungkinan Ini,

https://www.tribunnews.com/nasional/2021/04/25/baju-keselamatan-ditemukan-awak-kri-nanggala-diduga-tak-sempat-pakai-kasal-ungkap-kemungkinan-ini

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜競馬Fact Check 2021-04-28 Live直播九場HKJC香港賽馬會快活谷草地夜馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬
snippet.description:
跑馬地馬場今晚（28日）上演九場賽事，頭場定於傍晚6時45分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

華將一哥何澤堯剛戰贏兩項G1兼做騎師王，氣勢如虹，今次繼續騎七駒上陣，有望延續勝勢。

主持會分析他各駒的機會，配合各場馬匹賽績、體重變化、人馬合作等統計資料，一表睇晒，方便刨馬。

《競馬Fact Check》今季新增AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，出閘預測走位圖畀觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》亦有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

主持會分析他各駒的機會，配合各場馬匹賽績、體重變化、人馬合作等統計資料，一表睇晒，方便刨馬。

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

snippet.title: Kuburan Babi Akhirnya Dibongkar, Ada Apa?
snippet.description: Hewan yang dianggap babi ngepet di Bedahan, Sawangan, Depok, Jawa Barat (Jabar), akhirnya dibunuh. Babi tersebut kemudian dikubur di tempat pemakaman umum tak jauh dari lokasi penangkpan. Semula kuburan tersebut hendak dibongkar lantaran akan ada pihak keluarga yang ingin melihat. Warga sekitar beranggapan babi tersebut benar- benar bai jadi - jadian, namun hingga kini belum ada bukti kuat untuk menunjukkan kebenarannya.

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

snippet.title: Undergoing Hormone Therapy And Dating As A Transwoman In SG: Antasha | Ask ZULA | EP 8
snippet.description:
In this episode of Ask ZULA, Antasha shares her journey and experiences as a transwoman in Singapore from her childhood to her transition journey to her life now. 

Here are the timestamps of the topics covered during the episode:
0:00 - Intro
1:00 - Experiences growing up
3:11 - Exploring her sexuality
3:41 - Introduction to the trans community
5:41 - Starting Hormone Therapy
6:20 - National Service (NS) exemption process
8:49 - Mother’s support
9:39 - Hormone therapy experience
10:39 - Acceptance from society
13:40 - Misconceptions about being trans (Sex reassignment surgery, IC etc.)
16:55 - Workplace experiences
18:47 - Dating as a transwoman
21:17 - Gen Y speaks article response
22:35 - Advice and conclusion

About Ask ZULA:
Ask ZULA is a brand new segment on the channel where we ask people in our office to share their life experiences as well as their perspectives on the talk of the town. 

About ZULA: 
ZULA is a website catered to Singaporean female millennials. We cover lifestyle, perspective and inspirational stories of women in Singapore.

snippet.title: Kemudi & Jangkar Ditemukan, Kapal Singapura Temukan Fisik KRI Nanggala-402 | tvOne
snippet.description:
Jakarta, https://www.tvOnenews.com -  Panglima TNI Marsekal Hadi Tjahjanto menyatakan, seluruh awak KRI Nanggala-402 dipastikan telah gugur. Hal ini setelah citra bawah air KRI Rigel dan ROV kapal MV Swift Rescue dari Singapura, yang mencari kapal selam buatan Jerman itu menemukan bukti otentik. Bukti yang ditemukan yakni kemudi vertikal belakang, jangkar, bagian luar badan tekan. Kemudian, kemudi selam timbul, bagian kapal yang lain termasuk baju keselamatan awak kapal MK 11.

Saksikan live streaming tvOne hanya di https://www.tvonenews.com/live

snippet.title: ARSENAL 0-1 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Everton did the double over Arsenal with a first win at the Emirates thanks to a Richarlison-induced own goal by goalkeeper Bernd Leno. The game was a fairly even contest, with the Gunners being awarded and then denied a penalty, while Gylfi Sigurdsson struck the crossbar and Jordan Pickford was forced into a superb late save. A big three points for the Toffees and the fight for Europe rolls on!

Subscribe to Everton Football Club's official YouTube Channel: http://bit.ly/2wtCEbB

snippet.title: Gravitas: Angela Merkel says Europe "Allowed India" to become a pharma hub
snippet.description:
As India struggles with the second wave, Angela Merkel is worried about what will happen to exports of pharmaceutical products to Europe. The German Chancellor has said Europe allowed India to become "such a large pharmaceutical producer". WION’s Palki Sharma tells you more. 

#Gravitas #AngelaMerkel #Germany

snippet.title: 그동안의 올리 이야기
snippet.description:
작년 영상 이후로 너무 오랫동안 올리의 이야기를 전할 기회가 없었네요, 여러분. 모두 정말 보고싶었어요. 기다려주셔서 감사합니다!

영상을 보시기 전에 조쉬가 드리고 싶은 이야기는 이 곳에서 보실 수 있어요.(모바일 웹에서 접속하신 분들은 유튜브 앱 -- 커뮤니티 탭에서 보실 수 있습니다) https://www.youtube.com/koreanenglishman/community

모든 분들께 고맙습니다.

--

Today we catch up with Ollie and how he’s been doing since our last video we uploaded last year… To be continued tomorrow with his crazy idea for how we can keep filming in a pandemic! 

Here's the link to Josh's message in case you missed it: https://www.youtube.com/koreanenglishman/community 
(if you're on mobile you'll need to go onto the YouTube app -- community tab)

Thank you so much for your patience.

영상을 보시기 전에 조쉬가 드리고 싶은 이야기는 이 곳에서 보실 수 있어요.(모바일 웹에서 접속하신 분들은 유튜브 앱 -- 커뮤니티 탭에서 보실 수 있습니다) https://www.youtube.com/koreanenglishman/community

snippet.title: Foreign aid arrives in India to combat surging Covid-19 cases
snippet.description:
India's infection and death rates from Covid-19 are growing exponentially, overwhelming hospitals, in contrast to some wealthier Western nations that are starting to ease restrictions. The virus has now killed over 3.1 million people worldwide, with #India driving the latest surge in global #coronavirus case numbers, recording more than 2,800 deaths on Monday. Crates of ventilators and oxygen concentrators from the UK were unloaded at a Delhi airport early Tuesday, the first shipment to arrive in the country to deal with the crisis.

snippet.title: Radhe | Trailer | Salman Khan | Disha Patani | Randeep Hooda | Jackie Shroff | Prabhudeva | 13 May
snippet.description:
Yeh Eid, #Radhe Ke Saath
Countdown starts now!

#RadheTrailerOutNow

#SalmanKhan #JackieShroff #DishaPatani #RadeepHooda #PrabhuDeva #SKFFilms #ZeeStudios #SohailKhan #Atul #ReelLifeProduction #ZeeMusicCompany #ZeePlexOfficial #ZEE5 
 
The film will have a  multi-format release & a wide theatrical release internationally on 13th May 2021. It will release in over 40 countries including Middle East, USA, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, UK, Europe among others.

Directed by Prabhudeva

snippet.title: 台灣歌後龍飄飄比鄧麗君還紅，爆紅時下嫁窮小子，今63歲生活曝光讓人驚掉下巴#龍飄飄 #鳳飛飛 #茶娛飯後
snippet.description:
#龍飄飄 #鳳飛飛 #茶娛飯後
龍飄飄，原名許秀春，1958年6月20日出生於臺灣省台南市，臺灣女歌手。
更多影片：
民國第一美人徐來，一脫成名後息影做間諜，64歲死在獄中原因不明太淒涼https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rkTN8OTyZhQ

17歲離家出走被賣入青樓，逃出後成影后比蝴蝶還紅，卻因渣男自殺比阮玲玉還慘https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kk_Inu5RDxk

第一位電影皇后梅綺，18歲丈夫張瑛目睹她被欺辱，數年後創教害人害己43歲去世https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O7pI7Vw1tB0

邵逸夫的嫂子陳玉梅，16歲爆紅把老闆變成老公，夫妻恩愛50年75歲在香港離世https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VZu6ZJn6gUU

金魚美人李香蘭一生太傳奇，大紅大紫卻被判間諜罪，今真相曝光讓人震驚https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xw4ILPdLxeU

民國傳奇影星李霞卿，16歲和蝴蝶齊名，爆紅時息影轉做飛行員，86歲離世前生活曝光https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cLXX8VmzsDE

紅牡丹姜黎黎66歲近況曝光，曾大紅大紫卻因患癌息影，今與丈夫恩愛40年讓人羨https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7_rUmFGfXEg

民國第一豔星楊耐梅，大膽豪放女一夜輸掉40萬，晚年淪為乞丐太唏噓https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z3vYppMN8dU

黎姿的奶奶嚴珊珊，主動為丈夫納二房，情同姐妹共處33年讓人驚https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V46GQQnqNK8

第一位電影皇后張織雲，被渣男拋棄後淪為妓女乞丐，晚年死在香港街頭太唏噓https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IgT9ERFfJwk

民國當紅影星袁美雲，10歲被賣16歲爆紅，因不良癖好入獄毀掉前程太唏噓https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cbC7-yci1rs

賣身葬母入風塵地，從青樓女子到百變影后，宣景琳一生坎坷讓人唏噓https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X22AfH0xAIA

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal v Everton (0-1) | Premier League
snippet.description:
A second half Bernd Leno own goal condemned us to a home defeat against Everton on Friday night.

Mikel Arteta made six changes from the side that drew with Fulham last time out, the most notable of which saw Eddie Nketiah lead the line with both Alex Lacazette and Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang ruled out.

The England Under-21 striker was a ball of energy up front as he looked to make the most of his chance to impress, although it was the visitors who had the early sights of goal.

The first came when Lucas Digne curled in a cross that Dominic Calvert-Lewin headed wide at the near post, before the former’s deflected strike nearly caught out Leno, who reacted well to make a smart stop.

Bukayo Saka then had a snapshot saved after good build-up play, but despite dominating possession we struggled to clear-cut chances.

Leno made a full-length diving save to deny Richarlison on the half-hour mark, while Gylfi Sigurdsson hit the top of the crossbar from a free kick before the interval.

The visitors came close again after the restart when only a brilliant block from Rob Holding at the near post denied Sigurdsson.

We soon thought we’d been awarded a penalty when Dani Ceballos was tripped in the box by Richarlison, but Nicolas Pepe was adjudged to be millimetres offside and it was chalked off by VAR.

Calum Chambers then had a good opportunity when a free kick from the left bounced invitingly in front of him, but he flashed his shot high and wide.

Dani Ceballos then tested Jordan Pickford with a shot from just outside the area that was palmed around the post, as we looked to press home our advantage.

But with less than 15 minutes remaining, the visitors hit us on the break as Richarlison got past Granit Xhaka in the box and hit a low cross that hit Leno and went through his legs and in.

That proved to be the decisive blow, and settled an underwhelming match.

#arsenal #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.title: Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

snippet.title: Derek Chauvin found guilty of George Floyd murder - moment the verdicts were delivered | ITV News
snippet.description:
The jury has found former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin guilty of the murder and manslaughter of George Floyd.

The verdict, read out on Tuesday afternoon, was reached by a jury after less than a day of deliberations.

Mr Floyd died on May 25 last year after Chauvin, a 45-year-old white officer, was seen on video kneeling on the 46-year-old black man’s neck for about nine-and-a-half minutes.

The footage drew outrage across the US and triggered worldwide protests and violence.

snippet.title: 'If this erupts, it’ll hit the world': Barkha Dutt on India Covid crisis after father dies| ITV News
snippet.description:
There are of course thousands of families in India, in the UK and around the world, frightened of what might be happening to their relatives. 

ITV News was able to speak to the Indian journalist Barkha Dutt who has been reporting the Covid crisis in her country. 

Last night she lost her own father to the virus but she wanted to do the interview to talk about how badly the crisis has been handled.

snippet.title: ‘Till We Meet Again’: video of doomed Indonesian submarine crew’s farewell song shared online
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

“I'm not ready to live without you” are part of the lyrics of a popular Indonesian song that has become a submarine crew’s final farewell before their vessel sank off the coast of Bali. Poignant footage showing the submarine crew singing the song Sampai Jumpa or “Till We Meet Again” on board their vessel before leaving for duty has been widely shared online. Officials confirmed that all 53 crew members of the KRI Nanggala 402 died following the tragedy on April 21, 2021. The video was filmed and released by the Indonesian navy in March, but has gone viral in the wake of the tragedy.

snippet.title: Body Language Expert Stunned The Queen Did This At The Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Philip's funeral, although tiny, was nevertheless full of pomp and pageantry befitting the passing of the longest-serving royal consort. There was lovely music performed by a choir (a chamber choir, in this instance); a piper playing The Last Post and chorus; and despite having been warned to stay away due to ever-present COVID danger, crowds still lined the streets, hoping for one last glimpse of their beloved Duke of Edinburgh, a man many considered to be the entire nation's grandpa.

In fact, in one last act of service he performed for his own family, Prince Philip's funeral brought so-called "strayed sheep" Prince Harry back home, if even for a flying visit, and it seems as if he may even have exchanged a few words with his estranged brother. (Grandpa would have been sure to approve.)

The one image that will stay with all of us, however, is that of his widow, the 94-year-old queen, sitting all alone in her pew, head bowed, looking surprisingly small and vulnerable and oh, so heartbreakingly alone despite being the ruler of a nation of over 68 million people, not to mention assorted realms and territories. Body language expert Jason Lee, a former professional poker player who now works as a relationship science and data analyst with Healthy Framework, noticed one moment during the funeral where the queen did something unexpected. He spoke with The List afterwards, giving his interpretation of what he saw and what he thinks it means.

Watch this video for what The Queen did at the funeral that stunned a body language expert! 

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

Read Full Article: https://www.thelist.com/385575/body-language-expert-was-surprised-queen-elizabeth-did-this-during-prince-philips-funeral/

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜ 競馬Fact Check 2021-04-25 Live直播十場HKJC香港賽馬會沙田草地日馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬
snippet.description:
這天（25日）沙田馬場上演十場草地日賽，頭場定於下午12時45分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

今次是一年一度冠軍賽馬日，沙田上演三項國際一級賽，日本代表來勢洶洶，派出三冠馬后「謀勇兼備」於女皇盃中硬撼香港馬王「時時精綵」；另外準馬王「金鎗六十」亦會在冠軍一哩賽挑戰完成14連勝。

《競馬Fact Check》提供AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，將有出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》設有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於下午12時10分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》都會全程直播。

snippet.title: 【每日必看】世衛:全球至少17國發現印度變種病毒株 印度5月中單日恐飆44萬例達最高峰 @中天電視  20210428
snippet.description:
世衛組織，針對數據庫表示，全球至少有17個國家通報，超過1200組來自印度的B.1.617變種病毒株基因序列，其中大多數是從印度、英國、美國和新加坡上傳。也就是說，全球至少17國發現印度變種病毒株。

印度理工學院運用模型，進行研究預測，印度第二波新冠疫情將在5月上半月，約莫在5月14號18號之間，達到最高峰，需要治療的活躍病例，可能達到380萬例到4百萬例之間，而每天新增病例恐怕在5月4號到8號之間，達到44萬例最高峰。

印度缺病床，加護病房也不夠，德里每4分鐘有1人死亡，政府卻宣布，收到高等法院要求，將當地的阿育王飯店，1百間客房，改為只供法官及家屬使用的醫療設施，同時交給最高級的醫院來管理，引發民眾強烈不滿。

知名印度專家，全印醫學科學研究院院長，古雷瑞雅，這兩天的發言，遭到印度網友群起砲轟，他說新冠肺炎感染是一種輕微小感冒，8成5到9成的病患會出現發燒、感冒、身體疼痛以及咳嗽的正常症狀，因此確診的民眾其實不用瑞德西韋或其它特殊藥物，只要等待個7到10天，身體自然就會好起來。

#WHO #印度 #變種病毒 #古雷瑞雅 #疫情

localized.title: 【每日必看】世衛:全球至少17國發現印度變種病毒株 印度5月中單日恐飆44萬例達最高峰 @中天電視  20210428
localized.description:
世衛組織，針對數據庫表示，全球至少有17個國家通報，超過1200組來自印度的B.1.617變種病毒株基因序列，其中大多數是從印度、英國、美國和新加坡上傳。也就是說，全球至少17國發現印度變種病毒株。

印度理工學院運用模型，進行研究預測，印度第二波新冠疫情將在5月上半月，約莫在5月14號18號之間，達到最高峰，需要治療的活躍病例，可能達到380萬例到4百萬例之間，而每天新增病例恐怕在5月4號到8號之間，達到44萬例最高峰。

印度缺病床，加護病房也不夠，德里每4分鐘有1人死亡，政府卻宣布，收到高等法院要求，將當地的阿育王飯店，1百間客房，改為只供法官及家屬使用的醫療設施，同時交給最高級的醫院來管理，引發民眾強烈不滿。

知名印度專家，全印醫學科學研究院院長，古雷瑞雅，這兩天的發言，遭到印度網友群起砲轟，他說新冠肺炎感染是一種輕微小感冒，8成5到9成的病患會出現發燒、感冒、身體疼痛以及咳嗽的正常症狀，因此確診的民眾其實不用瑞德西韋或其它特殊藥物，只要等待個7到10天，身體自然就會好起來。

#WHO #印度 #變種病毒 #古雷瑞雅 #疫情

snippet.title: KRI NANGGALA 402 | Kesemua Anak Kapal Meninggal Dunia
snippet.description:
Panglima Angkatan Tentera Nasional Indonesia (TNI), Hadi Tjahjanto mengesahkan kesemua 53 anak Kapal Nanggala 402 telah meninggal dunia selepas beberapa bahagian kapal selam itu ditemui hasil penelitian di dasar laut.
 
Panglima TNI, Hadi Tjahjanto berkata, tanda isyarat tenggelam bagi KRI Nanggala 402 diisytiharkan selepas operasi pencarian dilakukan selama 72 jam.

snippet.title: India's COVID death toll may be much higher than officially recorded | DW News
snippet.description:
During the week between April 18 and 25, India reported 2.24 million new coronavirus cases, the highest number recorded by any country in a seven-day period. It also logged 16,257 deaths, almost double the 8,588 deaths recorded the previous week, according to Health Ministry data. India has been logging global daily records of over 300,000 cases for the last five days. The country saw 352,991 daily new infections and 2,812 COVID-related deaths in the past 24 hours. Altogether, 195,123 people have died while 17.3 million people have been infected with the virus in India. These numbers are staggering, but experts and epidemiological modelers believe that the real number of COVID fatalities could be much higher than the deaths recorded by health departments nationwide. "The distressing scenes of patients dying in ambulances and bodies burning on pyres outside crematoriums and even on pavements across cities and towns clearly show that the tragedy is far greater," Anoop Saraya, a private doctor, told DW.

localized.title: India's COVID death toll may be much higher than officially recorded | DW News
localized.description:
During the week between April 18 and 25, India reported 2.24 million new coronavirus cases, the highest number recorded by any country in a seven-day period. It also logged 16,257 deaths, almost double the 8,588 deaths recorded the previous week, according to Health Ministry data. India has been logging global daily records of over 300,000 cases for the last five days. The country saw 352,991 daily new infections and 2,812 COVID-related deaths in the past 24 hours. Altogether, 195,123 people have died while 17.3 million people have been infected with the virus in India. These numbers are staggering, but experts and epidemiological modelers believe that the real number of COVID fatalities could be much higher than the deaths recorded by health departments nationwide. "The distressing scenes of patients dying in ambulances and bodies burning on pyres outside crematoriums and even on pavements across cities and towns clearly show that the tragedy is far greater," Anoop Saraya, a private doctor, told DW.

snippet.title: $6 Chicken VS $450 Chicken!! RECORD BREAKING Chicken Meal!!!
snippet.description:
🏆 HELP US WIN A WEBBY AWARD! » http://bit.ly/WebbyBEFRSMakoko 
👕 CULINARILY WOKE MERCH » https://bit.ly/ShopBEFRS 
💗 SUPPORT OUR MISSION» http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon    
📷 JESSIE’S INSTAGRAM » @jessieluongg

Like our music? Enjoy a free 30-day of Epidemic Sound for the best royalty free music: http://share.epidemicsound.com/BEFRS 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
CHEAP VS EXPENSIVE CHICKEN 🐔

1. GÀ NƯỚNG LU VIỆT HƯƠNG 2
ADDRESS: 20 Phạm Văn Đồng street, Ward 3, Gò Vấp District, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/ganuongluviethuong 
 
🐔 GRILLED CLAYPOT CHICKEN: Season the chicken with a special homemade sauce made from salt, chilies, five spices and honey. Hang chickens in the clay pot for 30 mins, then flip the chicken and continue grilling for 15 more minutes. Take the chicken out, chop it up and assemble on a dish. Serve with bread and chili sauce.
 
💸PRICE: 150.000 VND/ $6.50 USD 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
2. SHANG GARDEN
ADDRESS: 1A Đường Tôn Thất Tùng Street, Phạm Ngũ Lão Ward, District 1, HCMC
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/shanggarden.dpg 
 
🐔 FORTUNE CHICKEN: Stuff the chicken with seasoning grains, mushrooms, Chinese sausages and bamboo shoots. Rub the chicken with seasoning grains and soy sauce. Leave it for one hour. 
Steam it for another hour, then remove from the steamer and wrap it in two layers of lotus leaves. After, wrap in a thick layer of dough. Finally, bake it for 20 minutes and serve. 

💸PRICE: 800.000 VND/$34.60 USD 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
3. ELISA FLOATING RESTAURANT
ADDRESS: 5 Nguyễn Tất Thành Street, Ward 12, District 4, HCMC
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/elisafloatingrestaurant
 
🐔 STIR-FRIED SKIN WITH LIME LEAVES: De-skin the back of the chicken. Tenderize the meat then cut into slices. Season with the liquid of galangal, lemongrass and five spices. Stir-fry the chicken skin with garlic and shredded lime leaves. 
 
🐔 SAUTEED OFFALS, BALLS AND BLOOD CAKE WITH GOURD: Chop up the offals and boil them with chicken balls and salt for two minutes. Season with oyster sauce, chicken powder, pepper, chicken oil and shallots. In a hot wok, add cooking oil, garlic and chopped-up shallots. Add the chicken offals and balls in the pan together with blood cakes, leaks and dried shallots. Saute for two minutes. Remove from the stove and place in a dish. Saute the gourd for another two minutes then add the rest of the ingredients to the pot. Mix and serve. 
 
🐔 BRAISED CHICKEN FEET WITH GINSENG: Grill the chicken feet until they turn golden brown. Chop up the feet and place  in a small steel bowl. Add ginger water and boil them for two minutes. Add chicken feet in ceramic bowls with medicinal herbs like ginseng, goji and dried jujube. Steam for 4 hours and serve when it's done.
 
💸PRICE: 10.400.000 VND/$450.00 USD for 6 dishes  
 
#BestEverSaigonFoodTour  #BestEverFoodReviewShow #BEFRS
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
💬COME SAY HI:
INSTAGRAM » http://bit.ly/BestEverInstagram (@besteverfoodreviewshow)
FACEBOOK » http://bit.ly/BEFRSFacebook
 
💗SUPPORT OUR MISSION:
Patreon is a platform that allows people to support creators on a recurring basis. Your contribution is an investment in the creative freedom of my channel and enables me to keep my content authentic and uninterrupted. Your generous donation allows me the time and resources to create more videos for you. We also have some pretty sweet rewards, exclusive to Patreon Bestys. » http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon

Our VIP Patrons: Jack Li, Stephen Balasta, Louis Chisari, Ryan Rhodes, Paul Citulski, Matthew Holden, David Baliles, Jackson Li, John Logan and Summer & Grayson Stumpf.  
 
🥒 ABOUT BEFRS:
Hey, I’m Sonny! I’m from the US but currently call Vietnam home. I’ve been living in Asia for 10 years and started making food and travel videos to document my experiences. I travel to different parts of the world, hunting down and documenting the most unique food each country has to offer. 

If you see any factual food errors in my videos, please feel free to politely let me know in the comments. I'm a huge fan of trying different, interesting foods in each country. My show is from a Western point of view, but more importantly, MY point of view. It is not meant to offend any person or culture.

snippet.title: 53 Awak KRI Nanggala 402 Gugur, Ini yang Dilihat Ahli Spiritual Saat Tenggelam | Ganjil Misteri| 243
snippet.description:
For Business Inquiries/Endorsement contact : idm.indigo@gmail.com

Saksikan Ganjil Misteri setiap hari Senin, Kamis dan Jumat, pukul 17.00 WIB

Kapal Selam KRI Nanggala 402 yang hilang kontak di perairan Utara Bali akhirnya dinyatakan tenggelam. Panglima TNI Marsekal Hadi Tjajanto menyatakan 53 awak kapal selam telah gugur saat menjalankan tugas negara. Kabar ini langsung membuat masyarakat Indonesia mengungkapkan duka dengan mengeluarkan kata-kata On Eternal Patrol yang berarti KRI Nanggala 402 sedang dalam misi patroli laut untuk selamanya. Tapi seperti apa sesungguhnya perairan Utara Bali itu? Benarkah peristiwa ini dipengaruhi unsur metafisika? Apa kata praktisi spiritual tentang hal itu?

snippet.title: Our Love For Fried Chicken: What Makes It So Irresistible? | Talking Point | Part 1/2
snippet.description:
Singaporeans love their fried chicken. From fast food to gourmet, our insatiable appetite for this indulgent food is seeing a comeback, bringing new sauces and food pairings to add to its sinful glory. Despite a growing health craze, we still find ourselves indulging in this guilty pleasure.

In the first of this two-part Special, self-professed fried chicken lover and host Steven Chia finds out what’s behind our craving for fried chicken, why do we keep coming back for more, despite knowing that it is bad for us? And what is this obsession REALLY doing to our health?

Watch more #TalkingPoint: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkMf14VQEvTai524iU74UlzpWvb1RRAvl
 
About the show: Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and revealing how it all affects you.

snippet.title: PSG 1-2 Manchester City | Champions League 20/21 Match Highlights
snippet.description:
PSG 1-2 Manchester City | Champions League 20/21 Match Highlights, Wednesday 28 April 2021.

Manchester City take a 2-1 advantage into the second leg of this UEFA Champions League semi-final after an impressive comeback success in Paris. Trailing to Marquinhos' header at the break, City turned the contest around through Kevin De Bruyne and Riyad Mahrez.

snippet.title: 【创造营 CHUANG 2021】哭成一片，全员合唱毕业歌曲《起风了》！
snippet.description:
▶02月17日首播，首周周三、周六双更，第二周起每周六晚20点更新一集
▶导师阵容：邓超、宁静、周深、Amber、周震南、Nene郑乃馨

《创造营2021》是由腾讯视频出品的国际青年文化交流男团成长综艺，致力于充分展现新时代国际青年人的音乐舞台表现力、青春活力和拼搏向上力。节目召集来自不同国家、不同经纪公司和院校的近百名学员，在多位榜样前辈的引领、助力、陪伴下一同进行文化与专业交流、打破重组迎接挑战，一同探索真我热血追梦。

snippet.title: Upaya Pengangkatan Badan Kapal KRI Nanggala 402
snippet.description:
Setelah melakukan operasi sar pencarian kapal selam KRI nanggala 402 di Perairan Utara Bali, Kapal Negara Tanjung Datu milik badan keamanan laut, Bakamla tiba dan sandar di Pelabuhan Tanjung Wangi, Banyuwangi, Jawa Timur, selasa siang. Kapal ini bersandar, untuk mengisi bekal ulang logistik dan mengisi bahan bakar minyak. 

Untuk mengetahui informasi terkini, terkait pengangkatan badan kapal dan evakuasi jenazah awak KRI nanggala 402, sudah ada jurnalis Transmedia Chofi Zamani, Di Banyuwangi Jawa Timur.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: KRI NANGGALA 402 | MV Mega Bakti Tiba Di Perairan Indonesia
snippet.description:
Kapal Bantuan Milik TLDM, MV Mega Bakti, tiba di lokasi pencarian kapal selam Indonesia, KRI Nanggala 402, jam 12 tengah hari tadi waktu tempatan.

MV Mega Bakti akan memasuki sektor pencarian seawal jam 4 pagi dan memulakan operasi mulai 6 pagi hingga 12 tengah hari esok.
 
Laporannya bersama Kevin Budiarto.

snippet.title: Indonesian navy submarine: Video shows crew singing - BBC News
snippet.description:
The Indonesian navy has released a poignant video showing the crew of a sunken submarine singing on board their vessel.

The video, filmed a few weeks ago, shows the sailors singing an Indonesian hit called Sampai Jumpa (see you later).

Officials confirmed on Sunday that the KRI Nanggala - which sank off the coast of Bali on Wednesday - had been found split into three pieces on the sea bed.

All 53 crew were confirmed as dead.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: MUTTON SCRAMBLED EGG | Biggest Scrambled Egg Cooking with Mutton Keema Meat | Lamb mixed Egg Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village we cook Scrambled Egg Omelette Recipe by adding boneless mutton meat with egg. We use the big vessel to make this biggest scrambled egg. We also use hand ground masalas to make this egg recipe yummy.

Finally, we eat these eggs with our favorite mutton recipe.

snippet.title: Presiden Jokowi Hadiri ASEAN Leaders' Meeting, Jakarta, 24 April 2021
snippet.description:
*Para Pemimpin Negara ASEAN Bertemu Bahas Situasi di Myanmar*

Para pemimpin hingga perwakilan negara-negara ASEAN tengah mengikuti jalannya ASEAN Leaders' Meeting (ALM) yang digelar di gedung Sekretariat ASEAN, Jakarta, pada Sabtu, 24 April 2021.

ALM kali ini terselenggara atas undangan Sultan Brunei Darussalam, Hassanal Bolkiah, selaku Ketua ASEAN. Sebelumnya, Indonesia menginisiasi ALM ini untuk membahas dan mencapai kesepakatan serta solusi yang baik bagi rakyat Myanmar.

Selain dihadiri oleh Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah dan Presiden Joko Widodo, sejumlah pemimpin atau perwakilan dari negara-negara ASEAN hadir dalam pertemuan tersebut. Tampak dalam pertemuan ialah Perdana Menteri Vietnam Phạm Minh Chính, Perdana Menteri Kamboja Hun Sen, Perdana Menteri Malaysia Muhyiddin Yassin, dan Perdana Menteri Singapura Lee Hsien Loong. 

Menteri Luar Negeri Filipina sebagai Utusan Khusus Filipina Teodoro L. Locsin Jr., Menteri Luar Negeri Thailand sebagai Utusan Khusus Thailand Don Pramudwinai, Menteri Luar Negeri Laos sebagai Utusan Khusus Laos Saleumxay Kommasith, juga Panglima Militer Myanmar Jenderal Min Aung Hlaing turut hadir dalam ALM kali ini.

Penyelenggaraan ASEAN Leaders' Meeting ini diharapkan dapat mencapai kesepakatan mengenai langkah-langkah yang baik bagi rakyat Myanmar dan membantu Myanmar untuk dapat keluar dari situasi saat ini.

Selain itu, para pemimpin atau perwakilan negara-negara ASEAN juga memiliki tekad yang sama untuk bersama berbagi pandangan demi kepentingan rakyat Myanmar.


Jakarta, 24 April 2021
Biro Pers, Media, dan Informasi Sekretariat Presiden

Website: https://www.presidenri.go.id
YouTube: Sekretariat Presiden

snippet.title: 4 IN A ROW 🏆🏆🏆🏆 | City 1-0 Spurs | Carabao Cup Champions 2021
snippet.description:
Manchester City have won the Carabao Cup for a record-equalling eighth time after beating Tottenham Hotspur 1-0 to lift the trophy for the fourth consecutive year.
Aymeric Laporte was City’s hero, heading home from Kevin De Bruyne’s free-kick in the 82nd minute to give Pep Guardiola’s side a thoroughly deserved victory, which sees us move level with Liverpool as the most successful side the competition’s history.

With 8,000 fans in attendance – the most at any game in England since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic – Guardiola’s men rose to the occasion at Wembley Stadium, where the win was made all the sweeter by the sight of 2,000 City fans celebrating at full-time.


READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/manchester-city-tottenham-hotspur-carabao-cup-final-2021-match-report-63754959

snippet.description:
#로제 #치킨 # 먹방

본 영상은 치킨인류로부터 광고비를 지급받은 경제적 이해관계가 포함된 영상입니다.

*뷰티관련 협찬(화장품, 성형외과, 피부과 등) 및 다이어트 제품군 협찬(약,보조제)은 일절 진행하지 않고 있습니다. 이 부분 양해 부탁드립니다

Higehiro: After Being Rejected, I Shaved and Took in a High School Runaway
当我刮掉胡子时，会发生什么事
===========
Episode 04 : Part-time Job
Episode Summary : 
Yoshida and Sayu reveal their feelings to each other and close the distance between them. Then, Sayu starts a part-time job at a nearby convenience store. Asami Yuki, who is a senior at the store and is in the same grade as Sayu, takes good care of her and soon becomes friends with her. After work, Asami hears that Sayu is living with Yoshida, and suddenly decides to visit his room to see what kind of person Yoshida is.

===========

snippet.title: Letkol Heri Oktavian, Sosok Idealis dan Kritis, Komandan KRI Nanggala-402
snippet.description:
Wartawan Harian Kompas Edna C Pattisina mengenal sosok Komandan KRI Nanggala-402 sejak 2011. Edna mengingat kembali mengenang sosok dengan Letkol Laut (P) Heri Oktavian yang ia kenal idealis dan kritis terhadap kesatuannya, sekaligus pada industri pertahanan Indonesia secara keseluruhan.

Artikel Terkait : https://www.kompas.id/baca/di-balik-berita/2021/04/25/pesan-dari-komandan-kri-nanggala-402/?utm_source=medsos_youtube&utm_medium=deskripsi

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9’s first stage will land on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceX’s Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.

snippet.title: Terungkap, ini yang Dialami Nathalie Selama Menikah Dengan Sule | Intens Investigasi | Eps 671
snippet.description:
For Business Inquiries/Endorsement contact : idm.indigo@gmail.com

Intens Investigasi, tayang setiap hari Senin - Jumat pukul 12.00 dan 18.00 WIB 

Konflik yang sedang terjadi pada rumah tangga Sule bersama Nathalie Holscher kini seakan memasuki babak baru. Setelah sebelumnya publik dikejutkan dengan linangan air mata yang diunggah Natalie di media sosialnya, kini publik kembali dikejutkan dengan curahan hati Nathalie yang juga dituangkan lewat postingannya.  Postingan yang berisi curahan hati Natalie saat melihat isi dm antara Sule dengan seseorang yang diduga Putri Delina, buah hati Sule tersebut nampaknya membuat Nathalie sedih dan kecewa. Benarkah didalam pernikahannya, Nathalie merasa tidak dihargai oleh Sule ? Dan benarkah Nathalie selalu di bandingkan dengan mantan istri Sule, almarhumah Lina Jubaedah?

Saksikan semua di Intens Investigasi! 
Jangan lupa Subscribe, Like, Share, dan Comment

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/intensindigo/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/intensinvestigasi/
Tiktok : https://www.tiktok.com/@intensinvestigasi

snippet.description:

Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches.
